text.title: Claude Best Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating which best-practice fix applies. Root question targets workload profile; each branch names a concrete observable and concludes with a rule reference or skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a production Claude pipeline (multi-worker OR cost-sensitive OR latency-bounded)?

branch.conclusion: Install shared rate bucket per rule r5.
Fix prompt-cache layout per rule r4.
Re-tier opus calls down per rule r1.
Switch eligible workload to Batch API per rule r6.
Set max_tokens explicitly per rule r3.
Skip; this is a one-off script.

example.trace: root → yes AND multi_worker=true AND shared_bucket=false → r5
example.description: A 4-worker async pool sharing one API key keeps tripping the 50 req/min cap. Tree concludes rule r5: install a shared token bucket, not per-process backoff.
